review_title: Good for Techinical SEO Audits
description: Great experience so far. I actually learned about this tool through Women in Tech SEO's Slack Community a couple years ago and it's been a game changer at the agency at work at.
author: Safia M.
pros: Easy of use. Lots of online training materials available. Good for technical audits of large ecommerce sites.
cons: Don't like the fact that I had to download the software. I wish it was solely cloud based.

review_title: Save your time, make your SEO even better.
description: I am very happy with this tool, it helped me understand many SEO issues and helped me figure out new, that i can fix.
author: Paweł J.
pros: Very intuitive user interface, many features that will help you understand the problems after the audit and whether it is worth working on it at the moment.
cons: Frequent updates are a bit annoying as they are required to work with the tool. On the other hand, it reflects well on software producers that they develop them and develop any problems that arise.

review_title: Serious SEO Audit Software
description: For all encompassing SEO software aimed at big sites needing detailed audits across multiple marketing areas Sitebulb is very complete. If your machine is of good spec and you have a need for deep audits such as accessibility as well as SEO tech audits, this software is a good option despite the high price.
author: Jonny C.
pros: This is probably the most serious bit of SEO software kit I've used over the last few years. The features go way beyond the standard SEO technical audits that most tools offer. This kit also dives down into other important website metrics such as content readability, website accessibility,
cons: As this is software that is downloaded and installed onto your local machine, you should be aware that if you are going to use full scans and all the technology available you'll need a high-spec computer. This uses a lot of RAM as well as CPU, so if you only have a low or mid-range computer (or laptop, in my case) then trying to do something else whilst the software is actively working will be difficult.

review_title: Sitebulb a clear winner over Screaming Frog
description: I perform in-depth technical audits for my clients, often using two or three similar tools, but Sitebulb is my favorite, as it provides detailed, concise, and consistent findings.
author: Doc S.
pros: The ability to easily drill down for further data with Sitebulb makes it a clear winner
cons: I didn't find Sitebulb to have any shortcomings at all.

review_title: A great option for site audits
author: Richard S.
pros: Well priced, easy to implement and gives comprehensive and easy to understand results
cons: Nothing, I'm a happy customer who would happily recommend it

review_title: It's my go-to site auditing software!
description: I'm an old school SEO who started with Xenu and Screaming Frog. I have used every piece of SEO software out there, and continue to come back to Sitebulb. It's easy to use, continually updated with best practices, and allows me to dial-in the MOST jarring issues quickly to fix.
author: Casey M.
pros: The software is unparalleled in its prioritizing of "hints" and "issues" the average SEO should review. I'm always shocked at how easy it is to pinpoint the most problems and get them fixed.
cons: Nothing. I've even requested features and those features have appeared in future releases. They take a clear people-first approach to their software.

review_title: Excellent customer service with deep understanding of the product
description: Great software at a very affordable price with flexible subscription period. Patrick Hathaway is a dedicated professional in providing the users the best experiences. In my case, he spent a lot of time in studying my audit report and provided high quality feedbacks with huge efforts of using a video to explain a fairly complicated case. I would highly recommend him as he goes the extra mile to thoroughly understand customer's needs and fully utilize Sitebulb to make significant improvements in SEO. He looks from the customer's perspectives and he demonstrates a high level of passions to help site owner to conquer the sophisticated SEO practices. His communication skills are top notch, precise and concise. Excellent work Patrick.
author: Terence C.
pros: The software is very comprehensive in providing all critical metrics of SEO which are well organized within the dashboard and resolutions are well documented to improve the implementation efficiency. In addition to his exceptional support, there are very helpful links on the official web page to enhance the understanding.
cons: The product is very easy to use. I have read some reviews saying the software can be slow on some computers but the software runs smoothly on my fairly powerful computer. The only thing I would suggest, if technically feasible, is that the software keeps running once started and does not stop after switching off the computer. Still, this is never an issue to me coz each audit can be completed in a fairly short period of time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tech SEO Analysis and Crawling Website with Sitebulb
description: I am using Sitebulb to crawl my website and analyze my SEO problem that I have mistaken. I can solve any problem because Sitebulb has information button for each problem that tells you the answer of any problems.
author: Berke O.
pros: Sitebulb has really important features to analyze your technical problem of your website. There are also hints that tells you how to solve your problems and fix them for better performance.
cons: Sitebulb has powerful cloud crawler that helps you alot. I don't believe that they are bad at anything, they are also almost carbon-free.

review_title: Great product, reliable & easy to use
description: I use Sitebulb as an auditing tool alongside other auditing tools. I find it is more comprehensive and I love how easy it is to export the data. The information is presented beautifully.
author: Briony C.
pros: It's super easy to use straight away, with no need to watch any kind of videos to learn how to run an audit. If you need to do some more advanced stuff, that functionality is there but doesn't get in the way of a quick & dirty audit.
cons: I can't think of anything - I'm always delighted by new features as they're rolled out and can't think of anything they're missing yet.

review_title: Perfect for most SEO tasks
description: For quick audits for small or big websites, is a very good piece of software at a very fair price. It's one of the most well designed SEO software you can get. For a freelancer or small SEO agency, it's arguably the best choice.
author: Omar L.
pros: Beautifully designed, helps you to determinate where to start when you need to optimize a website. Have a lots for tips, ideas and insights about what to do to improve SEO on a website. The option of run a sample audit (instead a complete audit) is one of the most useful ideas for most of SEO consultants. Also, the way that it combines data from Search Console and Google Analytics made it incredible powerful to understand the SEO potential of a website and create compelling reports.
cons: Some features to manage structured data or use multi filters are needed. Audits can't be properly exported and shared at bulk. Need to incorporate a better way to edit and manage reports.

review_title: Carbon-free SEO Tool
description: Sitebulb is really important SEO tool that you can crawl your site easily and understand it's outputs.
author: Anil C.
pros: Sitebulb is very useful, you can crawl your site easily. It is carbon free and it helps nature to be a better place.
cons: I dont have any bad experience for Sitebulb, the dashboard is super powerful.

review_title: Great Technical SEO Tool
description: At first, the program was a bit overwhelming. However, since then, the program has gone through many enhancements, and the user interface is easier.
author: Anne H.
pros: Each item is prioritized and links out to superb documentation as to why an issue is important. The site's documentation section can be accessed without an account.
cons: I wish it were easier to find pages containing certain CSS classes or scripts without putting in a specific page that already contained the code.

review_title: One of the best tool for SEO audit
description: Sitebulb makes our works fast and easy. my team uses a sop and with the hint from site bulb, they find and solve the issue very fast.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This software has quite amazing UX, and very easy to use for any level of users. We have a team that uses this tool daily to find issues in our client sites. And the hint feature is quite amazing.
cons: Till now, I didn't find anything wrong that can make a negative effect. Right now all the user of this tool in our team is quite happy.

review_title: A great crawling tool, combines the depth of Screaming Frog with easy to understand, visual reports.
description: I use it almost daily to create SEO audit reports for my clients. It saves me a lot of time and helps me to deliver reports that are easy to understand and visually appealing.
author: Juan G.
pros: The built-in reports on almost any aspect of the SEO of a site, from On Page, to Pagespeed Load. I also love the crawl map, one of the most useful ways I know of understanding the real structure of a site and detecting issues that prevent optimal crawling.
cons: I'd like it better if it were cloud based. I hate the constant updates, but I understand some updates are necessary at such an early stage.

review_title: Excellent tool for analyzing websites
description: Sitebulb was very beneficial in understanding the structure and SEO state of my client's websites. For one migration project of 10 websites, we used Sitebulb to verify that the migration was successful and hadn't introduced any new issues.
author: Brandon Z.
pros: Compared with a lot of the tools in the SEO space, Sitebulb has a great UI and some nice visuals to help you understand the scan results. Not typically a "pro" that would get mentioned for software, but release notes for Sitebulb are usually quite entertaining to read. Sitebulb is a newer piece of software, but it's continually being improved. They're constantly working on making things better. Checking their release notes, the last release was 6 days ago. Always nice to use software that still being maintained and improved. Sitebulb is incredibly useful for understand the structure of a website, if there are any broken links, what the SEO state of any given page is. Very useful tool.
cons: There's no free plan, so you're looking at committing at least /month. Luckily, the cost of additional users is only. This is a great example of how Sitebulb adjusted their offering to meet the needs of their users.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Powerful, easy to use SEO tool
description: Sitebulb makes SEO audits for me so quick and easy and they're presented in such a strong visual way that I can wrap them up quickly for clients who can easily digest the information without being confused or overwhelmed.
author: Josh P.
pros: Beautiful visual design, makes interpreting audits an absolute breeze.
cons: Some of the more complicated recommendations could use a little more detail in the system itself or pointers on how to resolve. On occasion I've had to do some Googling.

review_title: Brilliant technical auditing tool built by brilliant SEOs
description: It definitely speeds up our client work.
author: Bill S.
pros: Super easy to use. Cool visualizations. And it actually gives strong SEO recommendations.
cons: It takes some time to crawl the site, but really that's not a fault of the software. That's just the way crawling is. All of the crawlers take some time.

review_title: SEO Review made easy
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Makes my job so easy. I'm able to quickly audit a domain for quick fixes for SEO.
cons: I can't think of any major cons but it is annoying to constantly have to update the program to view audits.

review_title: Excellent software to give you key insights on your website
description: Sitebulb helps immensely identifying on page and technical SEO issues.
author: Tim B.
pros: Gives an absolute wealth of information on your website and provides actionable insights categorised into different levels of importance.
cons: Runs locally and slows down the machine slightly while using it. That said, generally audits don't take long and this local processing is what keeps the price of the software affordable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best On Page SEO Auditing Tool
description: My SEO audit will be incomplete without having SiteBulb On Page SEO Reports
author: Ramkumar P.
pros: Easy Intergration with GA & GSC for audit reportsChanging the crawl bots
cons: I dont find any con as of now with this tool

review_title: Sitebulb makes crawling websites super easy
description: The ability to see a visual representation of the structure of a site just makes it easy to know which pages have issues that need immediate action. This allows you to quickly redress imbalances.
author: Phil G.
pros: I particularly like the sitemaps feature. It allows you to quickly identify any imbalance on the structure of websites.
cons: Possibly that some of the features don't really have adequate instructions in using them or detailed explanations of the benefits of performing such tasks.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best desktop crawler with unique features.
description: Easy to use. Great reports. Awesome visualization of link juice.
author: Yiğit K.
pros: I love Sitebulb cause market needs a great alternative for Screaming Frog. They report like cloud crawlers but services were just like flexible as desktop crawler too. Maybe the only one solution that you can analyze link juice by visualizing it instead of doing this by Gephi or R. Keep doing guys, it is a great idea!
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software + great support
author: Matt L.
pros: Sitebulb goes beyond the standard auditing software checks and really dives deep into your website. The customer support is second to none if you do have any queries.
cons: Can't think of anything that jumps out at me.

review_title: Really cool functions that help you visualize and crawl your data
author: Lauren S.
pros: The visualize your site linking/crawling structure. Really cool way to be able to visualize how you are structuring/linking your data. It helped me see how competitors are doing better in certain areas of content. There is much more to it that I've yet to explore.
cons: It is a bit expensive. I wish there were cheaper options. I ended up not subscribing because it wasn't quite worth the expense to me at this time. I did really enjoy the feature of visualizing graph of the linking structure though.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
